title: Electron number density and magnetic field along random lines of sight from the Illustris TNG100 simulation
author: Bondarenko, Kyrylo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Here we present the electron number density and the magnetic field along random lines of sight (LOS) extracted from the Illustris TNG100 simulation. The datasets contain snapshots of the electron number density and magnetic field at  \(14\)  different redshift points  \(z_i\) ,  \(0\le z_i \le 6\) . At each  \(z_i\)  there are data for  \(1000\)  random LOS (of each type), having comoving length  \(100\text{ cMpc}\) . 
 The details of extraction procedure and LOS properties, as well as physical results, are discussed in the paper  [2011.11581] . Please cite this paper if you use data published here.
steps_raw:
Here we present the electron number density and the magnetic field along random lines of sight (LOS) extracted from the Illustris TNG100 simulation. The datasets contain snapshots of the electron number density and magnetic field at  \(14\)  different redshift points  \(z_i\) ,  \(0\le z_i \le 6\) . At each  \(z_i\)  there are data for  \(1000\)  random LOS (of each type), having comoving length  \(100\text{ cMpc}\) . 
 The details of extraction procedure and LOS properties, as well as physical results, are discussed in the paper  [2011.11581] . Please cite this paper if you use data published here.
